testcase.name: that true is true
testcase.file: tests/Unit/ExampleTest.php::that true is true

testcase.name: User can login with valid credentials
testcase.file: Authentication (Tests\Feature\Auth\Authentication)::User can login with valid credentials

testcase.name: Login tracks last login with real ip
testcase.file: Authentication (Tests\Feature\Auth\Authentication)::Login tracks last login with real ip

testcase.name: User cannot login with invalid credentials
testcase.file: Authentication (Tests\Feature\Auth\Authentication)::User cannot login with invalid credentials

testcase.name: User can logout
testcase.file: Authentication (Tests\Feature\Auth\Authentication)::User can logout

testcase.name: User can verify token
testcase.file: Authentication (Tests\Feature\Auth\Authentication)::User can verify token

testcase.name: Verify fails without token
testcase.file: Authentication (Tests\Feature\Auth\Authentication)::Verify fails without token

testcase.name: it logs in an admin and returns the correct role id
testcase.file: tests/Feature/Auth/LoginTest.php::it logs in an admin and returns the correct role id

testcase.name: User can update their profile
testcase.file: Profile Management (Tests\Feature\Auth\ProfileManagement)::User can update their profile

testcase.name: User cannot update other users profile
testcase.file: Profile Management (Tests\Feature\Auth\ProfileManagement)::User cannot update other users profile

testcase.name: User can change password
testcase.file: Profile Management (Tests\Feature\Auth\ProfileManagement)::User can change password

testcase.name: Password change requires current password
testcase.file: Profile Management (Tests\Feature\Auth\ProfileManagement)::Password change requires current password

testcase.name: Profile validation works correctly
testcase.file: Profile Management (Tests\Feature\Auth\ProfileManagement)::Profile validation works correctly

testcase.name: Admin can update any user profile
testcase.file: Profile Management (Tests\Feature\Auth\ProfileManagement)::Admin can update any user profile

testcase.name: Email update requires unique email
testcase.file: Profile Management (Tests\Feature\Auth\ProfileManagement)::Email update requires unique email

testcase.name: Debug routes and auth
testcase.file: Profile Management (Tests\Feature\Auth\ProfileManagement)::Debug routes and auth

testcase.name: It returns grouped permissions with stats
testcase.file: Permissions Api (Tests\Feature\PermissionsApi)::It returns grouped permissions with stats

testcase.name: It calculates permission usage correctly
testcase.file: Permissions Api (Tests\Feature\PermissionsApi)::It calculates permission usage correctly

testcase.name: It requires authentication
testcase.file: Permissions Api (Tests\Feature\PermissionsApi)::It requires authentication

testcase.name: Can get products collection
testcase.file: Product Api (Tests\Feature\ProductApi)::Can get products collection
testcase.failure: Can get products collectionFailed asserting that an array has the key 'data'. at vendor/laravel/framework/src/Illuminate/Testing/AssertableJsonString.php:299 at vendor/laravel/framework/src/Illuminate/Testing/TestResponse.php:911 at tests/Feature/ProductApiTest.php:46

testcase.name: Products collection handles models without specific tags
testcase.file: Product Api (Tests\Feature\ProductApi)::Products collection handles models without specific tags

testcase.name: Can filter products by type
testcase.file: Product Api (Tests\Feature\ProductApi)::Can filter products by type
testcase.failure: Can filter products by typeFailed asserting that null matches expected 1. at tests/Feature/ProductApiTest.php:104

testcase.failure: Can get single productFailed asserting that an array has the key 'type_config'. at vendor/laravel/framework/src/Illuminate/Testing/AssertableJsonString.php:303 at vendor/laravel/framework/src/Illuminate/Testing/TestResponse.php:911 at tests/Feature/ProductApiTest.php:127

testcase.name: Returns 404 for non existent product
testcase.file: Product Api (Tests\Feature\ProductApi)::Returns 404 for non existent product

testcase.name: Can create activity product
testcase.file: Product Api (Tests\Feature\ProductApi)::Can create activity product
testcase.failure:
Can create activity productUnable to find JSON:
[{ "name": "Test Activity", "price": 99.99, "productable_detail": { "guide": "Jane Smith", "duration": 180 } }]
within response JSON:
[{ "id": 42, "name": "Mountain Adventure", "description": "An exciting mountain hiking experience", "price": 99.99, "formatted_price": "99,99 €", "status": true, "is_draft": false, "status_label": "Actif", "status_class": "status-active", "typeConfig": { "label": "Activités", "singular": "Activité", "icon": "fas fa-hiking", "color": "#3b82f6", "class": "App\\Models\\Activity" }, "productableType": "App\\Models\\Activity", "image": null, "productable_type": "App\\Models\\Activity", "productable_detail": { "id": 7, "guide": "Jane Smith", "duration": 180, "meeting_point": "Base Camp", "max_people": 12, "difficulty_level": 3, "created_at": "2025-09-14T19:08:58.000000Z", "updated_at": "2025-09-14T19:08:58.000000Z" }, "productableDetail": { "id": 7, "guide": "Jane Smith", "duration": 180, "meeting_point": "Base Camp", "max_people": 12, "difficulty_level": 3, "created_at": "2025-09-14T19:08:58.000000Z", "updated_at": "2025-09-14T19:08:58.000000Z" }, "detail_fields": { "guide": { "label": "Guide", "value": "Jane Smith" }, "duration": { "label": "Durée", "value": "180 min" }, "meeting_point": { "label": "Point RDV", "value": "Base Camp" }, "max_people": { "label": "Capacité max", "value": "12 pers." }, "difficulty_level": { "label": "Difficulté", "value": "Difficile" } }, "category": { "id": 27, "name": "consectetur", "type": "Activity", "description": "Quis et dolores quod qui mollitia." }, "tags": [], "options": [], "relations": [], "statistics": { "views": 0, "reservations_count": 0, "average_rating": 0, "total_revenue": 0 }, "created_at": "2025-09-14T19:08:58.000000Z", "updated_at": "2025-09-14T19:08:58.000000Z" }].
Failed asserting that an array has the subset Array &0 [ 'name' => 'Test Activity', 'price' => 99.99, 'productable_detail' => Array &1 [ 'guide' => 'Jane Smith', 'duration' => 180, ], ]. at vendor/laravel/framework/src/Illuminate/Testing/Constraints/ArraySubset.php:80 at vendor/laravel/framework/src/Illuminate/Testing/Assert.php:36 at vendor/laravel/framework/src/Illuminate/Testing/AssertableJsonString.php:319 at vendor/laravel/framework/src/Illuminate/Testing/TestResponse.php:766 at tests/Feature/ProductApiTest.php:192

testcase.name: Role hierarchy is respected admin cannot assign super admin
